channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: New hantavirus case suspected on remote island as contact tracing continues
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- WHO reports six confirmed hantavirus cases tied to Spain-bound cruise
- Hantavirus: Spain readies to receive cruise ship
- Hantavirus Ship Triggers Political Storm In Spain
- Hantavirus CDC: Infected US passengers aboard cruise ship MV Hondius to be brought to this location. Details here
- Norovirus vs hantavirus explained: Key differences to know after 115 fall ill on Princess cruise ship
- Spain readies for evacuations as a hantavirus-hit cruise ship heads for Canary Islands
- US to send charter flight for Americans on hantavirus-stricken cruise ship
- Aboard the hantavirus-hit cruise ship, some passengers fear what awaits back home
- Hantavirus outbreak: All about Andes virus strain that can transmit person to person as CDC classifies virus as level 3 emergency response

- WHO says hantavirus risk low as countries prep repatriation flights

item.title: Trump says ceasefire still holds after fighting between the US and Iran flares
item.description:

- Trump says US is negotiating with Iran, despite fire exchange
- US fires on Iran tankers,  talks hang in balance
- US fires on Iran tankers, talks hang in balance
- Trump says ceasefire with Iran still holds after fighting reignites again
- ‘Just a Love Tap’: Trump Insists Cease-Fire With Iran Is Holding Despite Ongoing Attacks Traded
- Iran War Live Updates: Trump Insists Cease-Fire Holds Despite Exchange of Fire
- Trump says Iran ceasefire holds despite exchange of fire
- US and Iran exchange fire, but Trump says ceasefire still in effect
- Trump says ceasefire still in effect, but Iran ‘better sign agreement fast’
- Trump says Iran talks advancing despite rising tensions at Hormuz
- Trump says US-Iran ceasefire still in place after exchange of fire in Strait of Hormuz
- Trump says ceasefire still in effect after US and Iran clash
- US and Iran exchange fire, but Trump says ceasefire still in effect

- Newly Declassified UFO Documents Reveal Strange Sightings Over Moon and Earth
- Pentagon declassifies UFO files
- Pentagon releases first batch of previously secret files documenting reports of UFOs
- ‘Make up their own minds’: Pentagon releases first tranche of UFO files
- Pentagon publishes dozens of files on alleged UFOs
- Inside the UFO files released by Pentagon - Apollo photos to UAP sightings
- Pentagon begins releasing new files on UFOs and says the public can draw its own conclusions
- Pentagon Releases Previously Secret Files On UFOs
- Pentagon releases previously secret files on UFOs
- Pentagon releases previously secret files on UFOs
- Pentagon releases its UFO archives
- Department of War Begins UFO Files Release
- Pentagon releases declassified UFO files on government website
- Pentagon begins releasing new files on UFOs and says the public can draw its own conclusions
- Pentagon releases new files on UFOs, praises Trump’s ‘transparency’ push
